items.summary: In rural Paraguay, a small farming town flies Australian flags. When Paraguay plays Australia at the 2026 World Cup today, its residents will be at the edge of their seats.

items.title: What can Australia learn from Asia's battle with H5N1 variant bird flu?
items.summary: Experts say Asia's decades-long experience fighting bird flu has shown there is no magic bullet and that fragmented responses to the disease will fail.

items.title: Sexual misconduct findings not referred for Victorian Working with Children Check review
